description: vsct.fr is associated with SNCF Connect/e-Voyageurs web properties for train travel information and booking-related content. Publicly discoverable integration evidence for this domain is limited to an MCP endpoint used for train and journey information.
summary: vsct.fr exposes a public MCP server for SNCF Connect train and route information; no other developer-facing HTTP, GraphQL, or CLI surfaces were found on the domain.

surfaces.name: SNCF Connect : Trains & Trajet MCP server
